overall.description: A cinematic first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city during golden hour, beginning in an industrial district dominated by massive electrical transmission towers and storage tanks, then transitioning toward a downtown skyline featuring holographic advertisements and modern glass architecture. The footage exhibits high-end game engine rendering with ray-traced reflections, long shadows, and atmospheric volumetric lighting characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

sun glare intensifies as camera faces toward the setting sun between industrial structures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at an industrial intersection dominated by a massive electrical transmission tower silhouetted against the golden hour sun. The camera turns left around a concrete industrial building, passing a glowing green neon sign, and begins walking down a street lined with industrial infrastructure including storage tanks and smokestacks.

raised concrete highway or monorail track spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves forward, the industrial zone transitions to a commercial district with a clear view of downtown skyscrapers featuring bright holographic advertisements. Palm trees line the street and a pedestrian stands near a building on the right. The elevated highway structure becomes visible in the distance as the industrial tower recedes behind.

events.description: camera passes underneath the elevated train tracks and highway structure
brief shadow as passing under the overpass, then returning to direct sunlight

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds down a palm-lined street passing beneath elevated train tracks that cast geometric shadows across the road. A pedestrian walks toward the camera in the distance, silhouetted by the bright sunset. The environment mixes modern office buildings on the left with industrial warehouses on the right as the camera approaches a traffic light.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown approach with holographic billboards and construction barriers

events.description: approaching intersection with red traffic light visible ahead
green holographic billboard becomes prominent on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street toward the downtown skyline, passing a bright green holographic advertisement and construction barriers

cluster of tall modern towers forming the city skyline ahead, backlit by the sunset
red fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge
orange and white striped barriers and construction materials on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera emerging from under the elevated tracks and approaching the downtown area. A bright green holographic billboard dominates the right side of the frame, while construction barriers line the sidewalk. The traffic light ahead shows red, and the street opens toward a cluster of modern skyscrapers silhouetted against the golden hour sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty industrial district that gradually evolves into a gleaming, holographic downtown skyline during the golden hour. It begins at an industrial intersection dominated by a massive electrical transmission tower, turning past a glowing green neon sign and moving along a street lined with storage tanks and smokestacks. As the industrial infrastructure recedes, the scene opens into a commercial district where palm trees line the road and bright holographic advertisements appear on distant skyscrapers. The camera then proceeds beneath elevated train tracks that cast geometric shadows across the pavement, passing a silhouetted pedestrian before the environment shifts into a mix of modern office buildings and warehouses. Finally, the view emerges from under the tracks to reveal a dominant green holographic billboard and construction barriers, ending as the street opens toward a cluster of modern skyscrapers silhouetted against the sunset.
